title: TNT Buff (Configurable)
description: Buffs the block damage and health damage caused by TNT and TNT minecarts.
body:
This mod buffs the default explosive power of TNT and TNT minecarts. By default, the buff makes TNT explosions 2.5X stronger. You can edit these values in the config file after you first run the mod.

Great for blast mining and clearing land.
